comment: Österreichische Druckschrift: 4 strokes. 1: left vertical top→bottom. 2: top-left DOWN-RIGHT diagonally to valley. 3: valley UP-RIGHT diagonally to top-right. 4: right vertical top→bottom.

strokes.comment: Left vertical: top-left down to bottom-left
Left diagonal: top-left DOWN-RIGHT to center valley
Right diagonal: valley UP-RIGHT to top-right peak
Right vertical: top-right down to bottom-right
